title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 190.833 - No tax imposed prior to effective date
text:
190.833.  No tax imposed prior to effective date. — The ambulance service reimbursement allowance tax provided in section 190.800 shall not be imposed prior to the effective date of rules promulgated by the department of social services, but in no event prior to October 1, 2009.
(L. 2009 S.B. 307) 
Expires 9-30-29; see § 190.839
